description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves held together by five evenly spaced black metal hoops. The wood has a warm, medium-brown tone with visible grain, and the metal bands are matte black with a slightly hammered texture, giving the barrel a robust and traditional appearance. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and covered with black metal, suggesting durability and protection from the elements. One side of the barrel features a small wooden bung, typically used for filling or emptying the contents. The overall craftsmanship suggests it is designed for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods, commonly seen in urban or rustic settings. The surface finish is mostly smooth with some subtle texture from the wood grain and metalwork.
description: A traditional wooden barrel with black metal hoops and a flat, metal-covered top and bottom. The wood is medium brown, and a small wooden bung is visible on one side.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with its wooden staves and black metal hoops clearly visible, highlighting the curvature and texture of the wood.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the symmetry of the barrel, with the metal hoops and wood grain evenly distributed and no bung visible.
description_view_2: The barrel is seen from the side with a small wooden bung present, indicating the fill or access point.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the barrel's side, showing the wood and metal bands without any visible bung or additional features.
